name: Watermelon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix more than half of the mixture and add 1 teaspoon (modern: a few drops) red food coloring and 1/2 cup raisins.
2. Place the colored portion in the center of the cake batter.
3. Bake until done.
4. Frost the top with green food coloring made from spinach (suggest: green food color).
